_comment: Structured feeds (#626). Non-canonical illustration — semantics: docs/api/CONFIGURATION.md#download-resilience. Root: `feeds` plus optional `_comment*`.
_comment_resilience: Per-feed overrides merge after global Config (and packaged profile:). Field names match CONFIGURATION.md Download resilience. RSS uses rss_retry_*; media uses http_retry_*.
_comment_polite: Issue #522: host_request_interval_ms, host_max_concurrent, rss_conditional_get — see CONFIGURATION.md recommended presets.
